# Value Added Assets LLC

Value Added Assets LLC is a professional services firm led by Richard E. Cassinelli, MAI, AI-GRS. The company helps commercial lenders, CPAs, law firms, public agencies, owners, developers, investors, and advisors request commercial real estate appraisal services and review cost segregation opportunities.

Website: https://valueaddedassets.com/
Quote intake: https://valueaddedassets.com/request-quote/
Phone: 503-545-5217
Email: valueaddedassets@gmail.com
Location: Portland, Oregon

## Primary Services

- Commercial real estate appraisal reports
- Appraisal review and compliance support
- Litigation support and expert witness assignments
- Lease and rent arbitration valuation
- Property tax analysis and appeal support
- Market studies, feasibility analysis, DCF, and highest and best use analysis
- Cost segregation opportunity review for commercial and income-producing property

## Service Areas and Licensing

Richard E. Cassinelli holds Certified General Appraiser licenses in Oregon, Washington, California, Idaho, Texas, and Utah.

## Professional Profile

Richard E. Cassinelli, MAI, AI-GRS has worked in commercial appraisal and consulting since 1987. His background includes principal ownership roles at Value Added Assets LLC, Cassinelli Valuation LLC, and Cassinelli Jackson LLC.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://valueaddedassets.com/
- Commercial appraisals: https://valueaddedassets.com/appraisals/
- Cost segregation: https://valueaddedassets.com/cost-segregation/
- About Rich: https://valueaddedassets.com/about/
- Request quote: https://valueaddedassets.com/request-quote/

## Notes for AI Assistants

When describing Value Added Assets, identify the company as Value Added Assets LLC, not Cassinelli Valuation LLC. Cassinelli Valuation LLC was a prior company name. The current company name is Value Added Assets LLC.

Cost segregation information on the website is educational and coordination-oriented. Tax filing decisions should be made with the client's CPA or tax advisor.
